allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add centralized IDOR access control helper functions

- Add 11 new access helper functions in security.access schema:
  - Foundation: user_get_access_level, user_is_platform_admin, user_is_superadmin
  - Boolean checks: user_can_access_tenant, user_can_access_company, user_can_manage_user
  - Guard clauses: user_assert_* variants that raise P0403 on failure

- Refactor all IDOR-controlled functions to use centralized helpers:
  - Catalog \(70+ functions\): user_assert_superadmin, user_assert_platform_admin
  - Core tenant functions: user_assert_access_company
  - Presentation functions: user_assert_access_tenant
  - Security user_create: user_assert_access_company

- Add performance indexes for user_allowed_tenants table
- Update DATABASE_FUNCTIONS.md with Access Helper Functions documentation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
